scope: Kernel-local P0 comparison matrices for high-value Elementor V4 decision families. These matrices structure candidate comparison and evidence requirements; they are not resolver output.
applies_to: EV4 Elementor V4 decision governance only

global_boundaries.v4_only_target_scope: Elementor V4 is the only valid target design scope. Elementor V3 may appear only as legacy risk, migration boundary, unsupported target, forbidden fallback, or compatibility warning.
global_boundaries.official_docs_policy: Official Elementor documentation proves documented platform/editor capability only. It does not prove target-project availability, active Pro license, current user permission, constructability, Builder execution, runtime behavior, downstream acceptance, or production readiness.
global_boundaries.required_decision_record_policy: Future final decisions must be represented through Decision Record v2 and KROAD-005+ resolver contracts; this registry does not create resolver_status values.

matrices.title: Div / Flexbox / Grid

appropriate_when: Lightweight wrapper or grouping boundary.
Layout behavior is simple and does not require flex axis or row/column reasoning.
forbidden_or_risky_when: Children require deliberate alignment, wrapping, distribution, or two-axis placement.
Used as a vague fallback for unresolved layout logic.

appropriate_when: Layout is primarily one-dimensional: row or column.
Axis, alignment, gap, wrapping, or distribution is central.
forbidden_or_risky_when: Rows and columns are both meaningful.
Selected only because Grid availability is unknown.

appropriate_when: Rows and columns are both meaningful.
Two-dimensional placement must be explicit.
forbidden_or_risky_when: Single-axis or wrapper behavior is sufficient.
Grid source/project availability is not proven.

constructability_concerns: CE verifies target controls and capability before Builder-ready.
Builder must not substitute another structure without repair.
runtime_concerns: Wrapping, overflow, row/column behavior, and computed style need runtime evidence.
accessibility_concerns: Structure choice must not replace semantic content decisions.
rejected_alternative_requirements: Reject Div when layout behavior is central.
Reject Flexbox for true two-axis placement.
Reject Grid when one-axis or simple wrapper is sufficient.
matrices.provisional_behavior: Conditional guidance until KROAD-005+ resolver rules exist.
matrices.v4_only_boundary: Elementor V4 only; V3 is not a valid target option.
matrices.not_resolver_result_note: Matrix guidance structures comparison only. It is not a resolver result, does not set resolver_status, and does not prove decision correctness.

matrices.title: Image / SVG / Background image

appropriate_when: Raster/photo/media content.
Alt or decorative treatment must be decided.
forbidden_or_risky_when: Vector artwork is better represented as SVG.
Editable/searchable text is being flattened.

appropriate_when: Vector artwork or iconography.
Crisp scaling is needed and content is not editable text.
forbidden_or_risky_when: Raster/photo media is required.
SVG is used to hide semantic text.

appropriate_when: Decorative surface, texture, or layout background.
Foreground content remains semantic.
forbidden_or_risky_when: Media carries meaningful content needing alt text.
Background is used to hide text/icons/CTA content.

constructability_concerns: CE verifies asset availability/upload allowance and target setting path.
Builder must not invent asset source, alt text, or link state.
runtime_concerns: Rendered dimensions, cropping, and SVG behavior need runtime evidence.
accessibility_concerns: Meaningful media needs alt/label treatment; decorative media must not carry essential content.
rejected_alternative_requirements: Reject Image for vector artwork.
Reject SVG for raster/photo or editable text.
Reject Background image for meaningful content.
matrices.provisional_behavior: Conditional until asset, accessibility, and project evidence are attached.
matrices.v4_only_boundary: Elementor V4 only; V3 is not a valid target option.
matrices.not_resolver_result_note: Matrix guidance structures comparison only. It is not a resolver result, does not set resolver_status, and does not prove decision correctness.

matrices.title: Heading / Paragraph

appropriate_when: Text is a section title or document-outline node.
Heading level and semantic role are part of intent.
forbidden_or_risky_when: Text is body copy/caption.
Chosen only for visual size.

appropriate_when: Text is body copy or description.
Content must stay editable/searchable.
forbidden_or_risky_when: Text is a structural heading.
Text is decorative artwork.

constructability_concerns: CE verifies content boundary and heading-level constraints.
Builder must not flatten semantic text into media without repair.
runtime_concerns: Readability and responsive typography need runtime/browser review when acceptance depends on them.
accessibility_concerns: Heading levels must match outline; paragraph must not replace needed heading solely for styling.
rejected_alternative_requirements: Reject Heading for body text.
Reject Paragraph for structural heading.
Reject media text when editability/searchability is required.
matrices.provisional_behavior: Likely semantic option only; no resolver_status is assigned.
matrices.v4_only_boundary: Elementor V4 only; V3 is not a valid target option.
matrices.not_resolver_result_note: Matrix guidance structures comparison only. It is not a resolver result, does not set resolver_status, and does not prove decision correctness.

matrices.title: Button / Link / Clickable container

appropriate_when: Explicit CTA/action element.
Action/link behavior and label live on the element.
forbidden_or_risky_when: Would sit inside another clickable ancestor.
Target/action evidence is missing.

appropriate_when: Inline/navigation text or simple linked element.
CTA button semantics are not required.
forbidden_or_risky_when: Creates nested clickable topology.
Target URL/action is unproven.

appropriate_when: Whole card/container is intentionally interactive.
Children are proven non-clickable.
forbidden_or_risky_when: Any descendant remains clickable.
Focus/order/runtime behavior is required but unproven.

constructability_concerns: CE rejects or requests repair for nested clickable topology.
Builder must not execute missing action targets.
runtime_concerns: Actual click, focus, hover, keyboard behavior, and interactions need runtime/browser evidence.
accessibility_concerns: Interactive target needs accessible name and keyboard/focus behavior.
rejected_alternative_requirements: Reject Button when not CTA-like.
Reject Link when CTA control is needed.
Reject Clickable container when nested click targets or focus risk exists.
matrices.provisional_behavior: Topology risk classification only; runtime interaction is not validated.
matrices.v4_only_boundary: Elementor V4 only; V3 is not a valid target option.
matrices.not_resolver_result_note: Matrix guidance structures comparison only. It is not a resolver result, does not set resolver_status, and does not prove decision correctness.

matrices.title: Normal Flow / Relative / Absolute

appropriate_when: Element can participate in standard flow.
No overlay, offset, or stacking requirement exists.
forbidden_or_risky_when: Deliberate overlay/offset is required.
Used to avoid declaring positioning risk.

appropriate_when: Small offset or containing-block behavior is needed while preserving flow.
Absolute descendants need declared containing block.
forbidden_or_risky_when: Used as a layout patch.
Containing-block role is undocumented.

appropriate_when: Deliberate overlay or anchored placement is required.
Containing block, z-order, and responsive behavior have evidence.
forbidden_or_risky_when: Normal content should affect flow.
Containing block/overlap/responsive behavior is unproven.

constructability_concerns: CE verifies containing block and overlap implications.
Absolute remains blocked where target containing context is unknown.
runtime_concerns: Computed position, overlap, clipping, and responsive behavior require browser evidence.
accessibility_concerns: Visual positioning must not break reading order, focus order, or meaningful sequence.
rejected_alternative_requirements: Reject Normal Flow only with overlay/offset reason.
Reject Relative when it patches layout.
Reject Absolute when containing block or responsive behavior is unproven.
matrices.provisional_behavior: Relative/absolute choices remain provisional until constructability and runtime risks are proven.
matrices.v4_only_boundary: Elementor V4 only; V3 is not a valid target option.
matrices.not_resolver_result_note: Matrix guidance structures comparison only. It is not a resolver result, does not set resolver_status, and does not prove decision correctness.

matrices.title: Native Control / Custom CSS

appropriate_when: Documented Elementor/editor controls express the styling.
Target setting path and project availability can be evidenced.
forbidden_or_risky_when: Needed behavior is outside native controls.
Exact target control path is asserted without evidence.

appropriate_when: Native controls cannot express needed behavior and CSS environment boundaries are declared.
Higher dependency/cascade/runtime risk is accepted.
forbidden_or_risky_when: Native controls are sufficient.
Pro/Admin/addon/environment evidence is missing.

required_evidence: custom CSS environment boundary if selected
constructability_concerns: CE verifies selected mechanism is available in target project.
Custom CSS requires explicit environment and permission boundaries.
runtime_concerns: Custom CSS and computed style require runtime/browser evidence.
accessibility_concerns: Mechanism must not remove focus, contrast, readable text, or state visibility.
rejected_alternative_requirements: Reject Native Control when capability/path is missing for a hard claim.
Reject Custom CSS when native controls suffice or environment proof is missing.
matrices.provisional_behavior: Mechanism risk only; no CSS output or Builder action is proven.
matrices.v4_only_boundary: Elementor V4 only; V3 is not a valid target option.
matrices.not_resolver_result_note: Matrix guidance structures comparison only. It is not a resolver result, does not set resolver_status, and does not prove decision correctness.

matrices.title: Local Class / Global Class

appropriate_when: Style scope should stay attached to one element/context.
Reuse across pages/components is not intended.
forbidden_or_risky_when: The style is reusable design-system behavior.
Local class bypasses needed global governance.

appropriate_when: Style is intentionally reusable across elements/pages.
Class priority/order and mutation risk are understood.
forbidden_or_risky_when: Style is unique to one element.
Inventory, permission, or safe mutation evidence is missing.

required_evidence: local override or global reuse intent
permission evidence when mutation is proposed
constructability_concerns: CE verifies class inventory, priority, and permission before mutation.
Builder must not rename/delete/create classes from docs alone.
runtime_concerns: Cascade and computed style effects require runtime evidence when acceptance depends on them.
accessibility_concerns: Class reuse must not degrade focus, contrast, responsive readability, or state styling.
rejected_alternative_requirements: Reject Local Class when reuse/design-system behavior is required.
Reject Global Class when inventory, permission, or mutation safety is unproven.
matrices.provisional_behavior: Class choice is provisional until target inventory and mutation permission are proven.
matrices.v4_only_boundary: Elementor V4 only; V3 is not a valid target option.
matrices.not_resolver_result_note: Matrix guidance structures comparison only. It is not a resolver result, does not set resolver_status, and does not prove decision correctness.

matrices.title: Variable / Literal

appropriate_when: Value is reusable design-system value.
Target variable inventory and semantics are evidenced.
forbidden_or_risky_when: Variable inventory/Pro/permission availability is unproven.
Variable hides an unknown literal/dynamic dependency.

appropriate_when: Value is one-off, fixed, or intentionally local.
No design-system reuse is required.
forbidden_or_risky_when: Same value is reused across design-system contexts.
Literal creates drift from known variable governance.

required_evidence: target variable inventory or explicit absence
constructability_concerns: CE verifies variable existence, permission, and fallback behavior.
Builder must not invent variables or literal substitutions.
runtime_concerns: Resolved values and cascade effects need project/runtime evidence when acceptance depends on them.
accessibility_concerns: Values must preserve contrast, readability, focus state, and responsive behavior where relevant.
rejected_alternative_requirements: Reject Variable when target evidence or permissions are missing.
Reject Literal when reusable design-system governance is required.
matrices.provisional_behavior: Binding choice is conditional until target evidence proves the context.
matrices.v4_only_boundary: Elementor V4 only; V3 is not a valid target option.
matrices.not_resolver_result_note: Matrix guidance structures comparison only. It is not a resolver result, does not set resolver_status, and does not prove decision correctness.

matrices.title: px / rem / % / auto / variable

appropriate_when: Fixed pixel value is intentionally required.
Responsive scaling is not expected from the unit itself.
forbidden_or_risky_when: Fluid/responsive scaling is required.
Fixed value risks overflow/accessibility without runtime evidence.

appropriate_when: Value should scale with root typography/user settings.
Text or spacing should respect typographic scale.
forbidden_or_risky_when: Exact fixed alignment is required.
Root-size assumptions are unproven.

appropriate_when: Value is relative to parent/container dimension.
Parent context is known and intended to control size/position.
forbidden_or_risky_when: Parent basis is unknown.
Percent guesses responsive behavior without container evidence.

appropriate_when: Browser/layout engine should derive value from content/layout context.
Explicit value would be less stable.
forbidden_or_risky_when: Auto basis is unknown but relied on for precise alignment.
Runtime layout must be guaranteed without browser evidence.

appropriate_when: Value binds to a target design variable.
Variable inventory and unit compatibility are evidenced.
forbidden_or_risky_when: Variable inventory/value/unit/Pro/permission evidence is missing.
Variable avoids selecting a concrete unit policy.

required_evidence: variable registry evidence when variable is selected
constructability_concerns: CE verifies target control accepts selected unit/value form.
Builder must not convert units or formulas without explicit resolver/decision record.
runtime_concerns: Computed size, overflow, parent percent basis, and auto layout require runtime/browser evidence.
accessibility_concerns: Unit choice must not break text scaling, spacing, focus visibility, or responsive usability.
rejected_alternative_requirements: Reject px when scaling is required.
Reject rem when fixed alignment is required.
Reject % when parent basis is unknown.
Reject auto when deterministic sizing is required.
Reject variable when target variable evidence is missing.
matrices.provisional_behavior: Narrows candidate units only; no formula evaluation, conversion, or resolver result is produced.
matrices.v4_only_boundary: Elementor V4 only; V3 is not a valid target option.
matrices.not_resolver_result_note: Matrix guidance structures comparison only. It is not a resolver result, does not set resolver_status, and does not prove decision correctness.
